common.noAnalysis: No analysis found. Run “Analyze tender” on Overview first.

sidebar.demoNote: Demo MVP: market baselines and history may be simulated unless connected to real procurement sources.

errors.noAnalysis: No analysis found. Run “Analyze tender” on Overview first.
errors.needTender: Add a tender first (upload/link/text), then click Analyze.
errors.offline: Service is offline. Check the backend and try again.
errors.badResponse: We received an unexpected response. Try again.

overview.addTenderHint: Upload, paste a link, or paste text. We extract key fields and you can edit before analysis.
overview.riskMeaning: Higher means the tender may limit competition.
overview.advancedHint: Advanced details show internal signals and charts. You don’t need them to understand the risk.
overview.runToSee: Run analysis to see advanced details.
overview.runToSeeAdvanced: Run analysis to see advanced details.

errors.noTender: Add a tender first (upload/link/text), then click Analyze.

data.marketText: In this MVP, market prices may be simulated unless you connect real sources. The “Demo data” badge avoids misleading claims.
data.historyText: History charts are demo unless you connect real procurement portal data or your own dataset.
data.scoreText: We combine signals (pricing, wording, quantity, competition) into a 0–100 score to prioritize human review.

reasons.priceDetail: Tender price is about {pct}% above typical market for similar items.
reasons.specDetail: We found wording that may point to a specific brand/model or unnecessary constraints.
reasons.qtyDetail: Requested quantity is about {x}× the typical amount for this category.
reasons.compDetail: Only one participant often increases the risk of non-competitive outcomes.

priceHigh.title: Price looks unusually high
priceHigh.detail: Tender price is about {pct}% above typical market for similar items.

specsRestrictive.title: Specifications may be overly restrictive
specsRestrictive.detail: We found wording that may point to a specific brand/model or unnecessary constraints.

quantityHigh.title: Quantity looks unusually high
quantityHigh.detail: Requested quantity is about {x}× the typical amount for this category.

lowCompetition.title: Low competition risk
lowCompetition.detail: Only one participant often increases the risk of non-competitive outcomes.

pricing.title: Price & quantity
pricing.subtitle: Clear pricing signals: how far the tender is from typical market + whether quantity looks unusual.
pricing.tipPrice: If the tender price is far above typical market, it may indicate overpricing or restrictive conditions.
pricing.rangeHelp: A range where prices usually fall (roughly 95% of cases).
pricing.tipQty: Unusually high quantities can inflate budgets or narrow supplier eligibility.
pricing.advancedNote: This MVP uses category heuristics. You can upgrade later using learned baselines from historical tenders.
pricing.marketMeaning: If the tender price is far above typical market, it may indicate overpricing or restrictive conditions.
pricing.rangeTooltip: A range where prices usually fall (roughly 95% of cases).
pricing.quantityMeaning: Unusually high quantities can inflate budgets or narrow supplier eligibility.
pricing.quantityAdvanced: This MVP uses category heuristics. You can upgrade later using learned baselines from historical tenders.

history.title: Competition history
history.subtitle: Simple indicators for competition risk: few participants and repeated winners over time.
history.tipRepeated: If the same supplier wins repeatedly, it can suggest dominance or restricted competition.
history.demoNote: Demo history (replace with real portal data)
history.participantsHint: Fewer participants usually means higher risk of non-competitive outcomes.
history.dataText: This is demo data unless you connect a procurement portal dataset or your own historical records.
history.improveText: Connect real tender history and compute win streaks, market share, and repeated winner probability.

specs.title: Specifications
specs.subtitle: Wording that may limit competition
specs.missingSpec: Specification text is missing. Analyze a tender first (Overview → Analyze).
specs.clickToJump: Click a finding to jump to the evidence.
specs.defaultWhy: This wording may limit competition or unfairly narrow eligible suppliers.

fix.brand: Use functional requirements instead of a brand/model. Add “or equivalent” if appropriate.
fix.allowEquivalent: Allow alternatives (“or equivalent”) and define measurable requirements instead of one exact option.
fix.delivery: If possible, widen delivery terms or clearly justify urgency so suppliers aren’t excluded.
fix.absoluteTerms: Avoid absolute terms (“only”, “must be exactly…”). Use measurable requirements and allow equivalents.
fix.general: Rewrite as measurable functional requirements; avoid unnecessary constraints; allow “or equivalent” where appropriate.

charts.spreadSubtitle: Shows how prices usually vary. Wider spread = more uncertainty.
charts.advancedHidden: Internal sampling points are hidden by default to keep the UI citizen-friendly.
charts.spreadHint: Shows how prices usually vary. Wider spread = more uncertainty.
charts.spreadAdvanced: In demo mode, this distribution is simulated.

intake.nextHint: Next: we will show extracted fields you can edit.

upload.title: Drag & drop a PDF/photo/doc, or click to choose
upload.note: MVP note: file extraction is demo-level unless backend OCR/extraction endpoint is connected.

link.title: Paste a tender page link
link.note: MVP note: link scraping is demo-level unless backend scraping/extraction is connected.

text.title: Paste tender text (best for MVP demo)
text.note: We will auto-extract key fields. You can edit them before analysis.
